accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all provisions traceable to the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as FY2025 legislative branch appropriations.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendments to existing law for child care center fund and Title 5 fiduciary clarification.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes exceptions for law enforcement on computer network rule, waiver for telecom ban, and contractor bonus exceptions.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2025 applicability of various provisions and phase-in dates.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers major funding recipients and key policy riders including DEI, marriage beliefs, COLA freeze, and telecom ban.

concise.why: Appropriately comprehensive for a complex appropriations bill.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names Huawei, ZTE, Capitol Police Board, and relevant committees.
